summary: Chat messaging interface with enhanced input controls: image/GIF button inside the chat input (left side) that opens a popover/modal overlay, send button that swaps in place of voice button when input is active, and voice button shown by default when input is inactive.

existing_features.title: Move the image/GIF button inside the chat input field on the left side. When clicked, it should open a floating popover/modal overlay anchored above the chat input (not a dropdown) that contains image upload and GIF picker options.

Show the voice message button by default on the right side of the chat input. When the chat input becomes active (focused or has text), hide the voice button and show the send button in its place. When the input loses focus and is empty, swap back to the voice button.

new_feature_requests.summary: Image/GIF button inside chat input (left side) with popover/modal overlay when clicked
Send button hidden by default, swaps in place of voice button when chat input is active/focused
Voice button shown by default, hidden when chat input is active
